verdicts.note: Accountable spending clearly leans toward the audit-and-restrain pole, but the dossier does not document an explicit spending-cut, balanced-budget, or program-restraint commitment sufficient for the maximal -2 score.

review_notes: All 6 original pairs were reviewed. Elder's spending direction is supported but its magnitude was overstated; Donaghy's other issue areas lack sufficiently specific rubric mechanisms for missing scores.
